message:
Filter beyond-db-size freelist entries from pending commit page prediction

Freelist pages with page numbers exceeding db_size are ephemeral
(allocated then rolled back by concurrent transactions) and should not
appear in the durable commit set. Filter them in pending_commit_pages()
to prevent false positive dirty-page predictions that could cause
unnecessary I/O during commit. Adds test verifying EOF-only freelist
pages are excluded from predictions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
